title: ophiopogon caulescens var. prolifer
intro: Ophiopogon caulescens var. prolifer, also known as the fountain plant, is a type of flowering plant in the lily family. It is a perennial evergreen with a unique ability to produce new plants from its stems, hence the name "prolifer". The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China and Japan, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ophiopogon caulescens var. prolifer include reducing fatigue, improving sleep quality, and supporting kidney and respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
